mapper.sql: user_id, nickname, password, avatar_url, openid, gender, phone, real_name, id_card, signature, community, province, city, district, identity_images, user_role, status, auth_status, create_time, last_login_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT FROM user WHERE auth_status = 1 ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE auth_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE auth_status = 1 AND community = #{community}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user
mapper.update:
UPDATE user
nickname = #{nickname}, password = #{password}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, openid = #{openid}, gender= #{gender}, phone = #{phone}, real_name = #{realName}, id_card = #{idCard}, signature = #{signature}, community = #{community},
province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, identity_images = #{identityImages,typeHandler=cn.edu.ccst.communitysocialmain.typehandler.DelimitedStringListTypeHandler}, user_role = #{userRole}, status = #{status}, auth_status = #{authStatus}, last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 2
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.like_count), 0) FROM post p WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collection WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM ( SELECT user_id FROM post WHERE publish_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) UNION SELECT user_id FROM comment WHERE comment_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ) AS active_users
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE user_role = #{userRole}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE status = #{status}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE user_role IN (2, 3)
AND nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT community, COUNT(*) as count FROM user GROUP BY community ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT FROM user WHERE community = #{community} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT community) FROM user WHERE community IS NOT NULL AND community != ''
SELECT DISTINCT community FROM user WHERE community IS NOT NULL AND community != '' ORDER BY community

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE user_role = 2 AND auth_status = 1
AND ( real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
SELECT FROM user WHERE user_role = #{userRole} ORDER BY create_time DESC
